Done. The file `/home/nick/work/libnn/Source/ConvolutionFunctions/riscv_nn_conv_dw_HWC_u8_u8_u8_asym_bias_any.c` now has:

- `#ifdef ENA_AGENT_OPT_CONV_DW_HWC_U8_U8_U8_ASYM_BIAS_ANY` branch inside the ELEN64 block with the vmulh optimization:
  - Added `vmulh_extra_shift = out_shift2 - 32` variable
  - Replaced the two-part vwmul requantization with single-pass `NDS_VEC_VMULH_VX` at e32m8
  - Conditional `NDS_VEC_VSRA_VX` for extra shift when `vmulh_extra_shift > 0`
  - Narrowing chain: e32m8 -> e16m4 -> e8m2, all on V0 (no V24 needed)
  - No part-1/part-2 split - all elements processed in one pass
  - Kernel loop (bias load, vle8, vzext, vadd, vwmacc) left identical
- `#else` branch contains the original code byte-for-byte unchanged
